From Chandra lagna, the second lord is in the 11th house, and also 11th lord is in the

Interpretation
This combination is similar to the combination Bill Gates has, where Kendra lord
combines with Trikona lord and that makes him a Multi Millionaire.

Technical details
His 4th lord is in the 1st house. From chandra lagna 4th lord is in the 2nd house, and
from karakamsa lagna 4th lord is in the 11th house.
Interpretation
He would have immense love and affection for his mother, and also for other elders.
OTHER INTERESTING ANALYSIS
Mr Kumaramangalam Birla was involved in a bitter corporate battle couple of years
back, and that was when Saturn moved into his 12th house.
His 10th lord is in the 2nd house with Venus. From chandra lagna 10th lord is in the
